filters_documentation.f_AL: Locks search to Easy Apply Only jobs. (true)
filters_documentation.f_TPR: Time Posted Range constraint. 'r86400' = Past 24 hours, 'r604800' = Past 7 days.
filters_documentation.f_E: Experience Level database codes. 1=Intern, 2=Entry, 3=Associate, 4=Mid-Senior, 5=Director. Use commas to stack.
filters_documentation.sortBy: Search sorting algorithm. 'R' = Relevance, 'DD' = Date Descending (Most Recent).
filters_documentation.distance: Proximity radius from central location or geoId.
